title: Project Rubezh
description: The mod adds body armor and helmet types from the game of the same name, Escape from Tarkov.
body:
# The mod contains 12 helmets and 11 body armor.(abandoned)
## Helmet:

![Green Beret](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/692833a4a9311cd190343a08438abc9de93bf46b.png)

Green Beret

![SSH-68](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8cfdc107fc5ddaff50ebf8e63a093e49ebd8c896.png)

SSH-68

![HighCom "Striker ULACH IIIA" helmet (Coyote Tan)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/414c4ab97b8dc8a091cf3be8f9ae2c31ea39d08d.png)

HighCom "Striker ULACH IIIA" helmet (Coyote Tan)

![HighCom "Striker ACHHC IIIA" Helmet (Black)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/025ecadb1dc50aefece295445d3b2f53854c2f3e_0.webp)

HighCom "Striker ACHHC IIIA" Helmet (Black)

![UN Peacekeeping Helmet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d7a93e34c772daa420c3de6d4b5f92e68a95474.png)

UN Peacekeeping Helmet

![Armored helmet "Vulcan-5" (LShZ-5)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eec42d26b5227303d024ea5333462be45d036b69_0.webp)

Armored helmet "Vulcan-5" (LShZ-5)

![Team Wendy "EXFIL Ballistic" Helmet (Black)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4d96ccb6f481f592a957e194ea5da84364ea0aa_0.webp)

Team Wendy "EXFIL Ballistic" Helmet (Black)

![Combined arms helmet 6B47 "Ratnik-BSh" (Flora Tsifra case)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/822c32025b37c9adb6f458ee0a6cebebf257dc33.png)

Combined arms helmet 6B47 "Ratnik-BSh" (Flora Tsifra case)

![ Helmet Mask-1Sh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f0b3fe2496e08c839ffdde6ce2e2473f7d94e9d.png)

Helmet Mask-1Sh

## Body armor and unloading:

![Bulletproof vest 6B2 (Flora)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e59c6f9a8abf2f1c64c8888bad044036c9d1032b.png)

Bulletproof vest 6B2 (Flora)

![Unloading vest 6B4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd885311e8201e04c7c710c2c30723ee831aa8de.png)

Unloading vest 6B4

![Unloading vest with armor plates 6B5-16 Zh-86 "Uley"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ec0bf1cc225932938b0e1dc1134b674f112d76d.png)

Unloading vest with armor plates 6B5-16 Zh-86 "Uley"

![BNTI "Gzhel-K" bulletproof vest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8626c3c812c0458b7dcbbb6f2e2b4d2fca3dc7a.png)

BNTI "Gzhel-K" bulletproof vest

![UN Peacekeeping Forces Bulletproof Vest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6dbe8f2d54f6441691596138fc2d6fe97467cd7.png)

UN Peacekeeping Forces Bulletproof Vest

![Body Armor LBT-6094A Slick Plate Carrier (Coyote Tan)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/977dac9777f783dc4918c1676bd5e055c755109c.png)

Body Armor LBT-6094A Slick Plate Carrier (Coyote Tan)

![NFM "THOR Concealable Reinforced Vest"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2178abc44de19f4f93fb6567fb116e82a5dccb64_0.webp)

NFM "THOR Concealable Reinforced Vest"

![IOTV Gen4 Body Armor (Full Protection)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a99a77c4d92f93a9f1f8a0afe2b366994ce86d9a.png)

IOTV Gen4 Body Armor (Full Protection)

![Body armor 6B43 "Zabralo-Sh" (Flora Tsifra)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7dec0915802118c338001cbd0892f8e066ce80af.png)

Body armor 6B43 "Zabralo-Sh" (Flora Tsifra)

# The mod is Universal

P.S.
This is my first mod Don't judge strictly
former name Project Armor
